meaning: definitely written down (possessed by/connected to كِتٰبٍ - book)
the built/inhabited one (describing البَيْتِ - the House)
and the roof (connected to المَرفُوعِ - the raised)
the raised one (describing السَّقْفِ - the canopy/roof)
punishment (object of إِنَّ, possessed by رَبِّكَ)
it moves in waves (subject of السَّمَآءُ)
with a mighty swaying (describing how السَّمَآءُ moves)
and it moves/travels (subject: الْجِبَالُ - the mountains)
so woe! (as a complete warning statement)
on that day (referring to the Day of Judgment mentioned in this surah)
those who (referring to the people who are playing in idle discourse)
they are playing (those who are in vain discourse)
they are being pushed forcefully (إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ)
Hell (being pushed into جَهَنَّمَ in this ayah)
with forceful pushing (describes how they are pushed)
this (pointing to something feminine) (pointing to النَّارُ - the Fire)
the intense fire (subject of كُنتُم تُكَذِّبُونَ)
which, that (referring to النَّارُ - the fire)
you all were (referring to those who denied the truth)
with it/by it (referring to النَّارُ - the fire)
Is it then magic? (connected to هٰذَآ - this)
this (pointing to what was just mentioned)
or rather (connecting to أَفَسِحْرٌ 'is this magic?')
you (all) perceive/see (in response to أَفَسِحْرٌ هٰذَآ - 'Is this magic?')
only/just (what you are being rewarded is تُجْزَوْنَ)
you (all) are being repaid (for ما كنتم تعملون - what you used to do)
you all were (referring to what you used to do)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ are in gardens)
happy and delighted ones (describing their state)
he gave them (object of فٰكِهِينَ - enjoying)
their Lord (who gave them what they enjoy)
the hellfire (the place being referred to in عَذَابَ)
and drink! (command to many people) (connected to كُلُوا۟)
in a very pleasant and beneficial way (describing how to eat and drink in كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟)
because of what (connects كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ to تَعْمَلُونَ)
you all do/work (referring to the actions mentioned in كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟)
those who are reclining (describing the people of Paradise)
on couches/thrones (being reclined upon, as shown by عَلَىٰ)
and we married them (to حُورٍ عِينٍ - fair companions)
with companions with beautiful eyes (object of زَوَّجْنٰهُم)
large-eyed ones (describing حُورٍ, showing it follows بِ)
and she followed them closely/devotedly (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
with them (refers to ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ - their offspring)
held as security (as the main description in the sentence)
and we supplied them (with بِفٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ - fruits and meat)
in it (referring to كَأْسًا 'a cup' mentioned in this ayah)
a cup (being passed around by يَتَنٰزَعُونَ)
useless talk (subject of لَّا - 'there is no')
in it (referring to كَأْسًا - a cup)
and not (connects to previous negation لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا - no idle talk in it)
surely for them (referring to the young servants mentioned in غِلْمَانٌ)
and he came forward (subject of يَتَسَآءَلُونَ)
some of them (subject of أَقْبَلَ - came forward)
upon, on, against (connecting بَعْضُهُمْ to بَعْضٍ)
indeed we (speaking to قَالُوٓا۟ - they said)
our family (after فِي in this ayah)
those who are anxious/fearful (in their homes before judgment)
and then He bestowed favor (subject of this ayah is اللَّهُ)
upon us (connected to فَمَنَّ - He bestowed favors)
the intensely hot wind (object of عَذَابَ/torment)
indeed He (referring to Allah in هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The Most Righteous One (referring to Allah)
The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)
Or (connecting to previous statement: 'Do they say you are a soothsayer?')
a poet (what they claim about محمد ﷺ)
we wait and watch intensely (subject of يَقُولُونَ)
with him/it (referring to the poet they're waiting about)
then indeed I (connected to تَرَبَّصُوا۟ - wait)
with you all (addressing the disbelievers in تَرَبَّصُوا)
the ones who wait watchfully (after مِنَ)
or (connecting to تَأْمُرُهُمْ - do their minds command them)
with this (referring to their dreams commanding them)
or (connecting to تَأْمُرُهُمْ - do their minds command them)
those who cross boundaries (predicate of هُمْ)
Or rather (connecting to what was said before)
he made it up (falsely) (object of يَقُولُونَ)
so let them come (in response to their claims)
with a narrative (object of فَلْيَأْتُوا - let them bring)
or (connecting to خُلِقُوا - were they created)
they were created (referring to the disbelievers being questioned in this ayah)
or (connecting to previous verse to ask: were they created from nothing, or are they the creators?)
or (questioning if they created the heavens and earth)
and the earth (as object of خَلَقُوا/they created)
or (connecting to عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ - do they have your Lord's treasures)
or (asking about خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ - the treasures of your Lord)
or (introducing a question about an alternative possibility)
they are listening carefully (referring to the disbelievers in فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم)
or (asking about which of two options is true)
for him/to him (referring to who الْبَنٰتُ belongs to)
and for you all (contrasted with لَهُ meaning 'for him')
you ask them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
a payment/reward (object of تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ - you ask them)
a heavy debt, a severe penalty (that weighs them down)
or (asking about the second of two choices)
a secret plan (object of يُرِيدُونَ/they want)
for them (referring to those who reject Allah's message)
of Allah (object of سُبْحٰنَ/glory be to)
they see (subject of يَقُولُوا۟ - they say)
a piece/fragment (object of يَرَوْا - they see)
so leave them! (command to leave them until يُلٰقُوا۟)
who/which/that (connects to يُصْعَقُونَ - they will be struck)
he makes (something/someone) free from need (subject of كَيْدُهُمْ)
from them (object of يُغْنِى - their plot will not avail them)
and indeed (connects to previous statement about punishment)
and yet/but still (connects to عَذَابًا 'punishment' mentioned before)
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
and be patient! (connected to سَبِّحْ - glorify)
under our eyes (being watched by us)
and glorify! (connected to اصْبِرْ - be patient)
